title: Migration script skeleton for Notion -> Graphiti
userStory: As an operator, I want a NotionMigrator class scaffolded so that per-source migration logic has a consistent home.
acceptanceCriteria: New file migrate/notion_to_graphiti.py defines class NotionMigrator with methods: migrate_application_tracker, migrate_outreach_samples, migrate_writing_samples, migrate_my_story, migrate_outreach_philosophy, migrate_voice_rules
Each migrate_* function pages through the source, builds episode body + entity_hints, calls graphiti.add_episode(name, body, source_description, reference_time, entity_hints)
--dry-run logs the would-be calls without invoking Graphiti
Verify: python migrate/notion_to_graphiti.py --source application_tracker --dry-run prints planned episodes for at least one row
